name: FBR Expenses Detail
query:
SELECT
  ec.name AS "Expense Claim:Link/Expense Claim:170",
  ec.posting_date AS "Date:Date:95",
  ec.employee AS "Employee:Link/Employee:130",
  ec.employee_name AS "Employee Name:Data:160",
  ec.company AS "Company:Link/Company:170",
  ec.status AS "Status:Data:110",
  ec.total_claimed_amount AS "Claimed Amount:Currency:140",
  ec.total_sanctioned_amount AS "Sanctioned Amount:Currency:150",
  ec.total_taxes_and_charges AS "Taxes & Charges:Currency:130",
  ec.grand_total AS "Grand Total:Currency:130"
FROM `tabExpense Claim` ec
WHERE ec.docstatus = 1
  AND ec.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
ORDER BY ec.posting_date DESC, ec.name DESC;

name: FBR Sales Detail
query:
SELECT
  si.name AS "Sales Invoice:Link/Sales Invoice:170",
  si.posting_date AS "Date:Date:95",
  si.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer:170",
  si.currency AS "Currency:Data:70",
  si.base_grand_total AS "Base Grand Total:Currency:130",
  si.grand_total AS "Grand Total:Currency:130",
  si.custom_invoice_type AS "FBR Invoice Type:Data:130",
  si.custom_scenario_id AS "FBR Scenario:Data:120",
  si.custom_tax_payer_type AS "Buyer Tax Payer Type:Data:150",
  si.custom_fbr_invoice_no AS "FBR Invoice No:Data:200",
  si.custom_fbr_invoice_status AS "FBR Status:Data:120",
  si.custom_fbr_invoice_status_code AS "FBR Status Code:Data:120",
    si.custom_fbr_submission_time AS "FBR Submission Time:Datetime:170",
  si.custom_fbr_integration_type AS "FBR Integration Type:Data:140"
FROM `tabSales Invoice` si
WHERE si.docstatus = 1
  AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
ORDER BY si.posting_date DESC, si.name DESC;

name: FBR Purchases Detail
query:
SELECT
  pi.name AS "Purchase Invoice:Link/Purchase Invoice:180",
  pi.posting_date AS "Date:Date:95",
  pi.supplier AS "Supplier:Link/Supplier:180",
  pi.supplier_name AS "Supplier Name:Data:180",
  pi.currency AS "Currency:Data:70",
  pi.base_grand_total AS "Base Grand Total:Currency:130",
  pi.grand_total AS "Grand Total:Currency:130",
  pi.outstanding_amount AS "Outstanding:Currency:120",
  pi.bill_no AS "Supplier Bill No:Data:140",
  pi.bill_date AS "Supplier Bill Date:Date:110"
FROM `tabPurchase Invoice` pi
WHERE pi.docstatus = 1
  AND pi.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
ORDER BY pi.posting_date DESC, pi.name DESC;

name: FBR Sales Summary
query:
SELECT
  si.name AS "Sales Invoice:Link/Sales Invoice:160",
  si.posting_date AS "Date:Date:90",
  si.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer:180",
  si.grand_total AS "Grand Total:Currency:120",
  si.custom_fbr_invoice_no AS "FBR Invoice No:Data:220"
FROM `tabSales Invoice` si
WHERE si.docstatus = 1
  AND IFNULL(si.custom_fbr_invoice_no, '') != ''
ORDER BY si.posting_date DESC;

name: Sales by item Group
query:
SELECT
  i.item_group AS "Item Group:Link/Item Group:210",

  SUM(CASE WHEN si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Total:Currency:170",

  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 1 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Jan:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 2 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Feb:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 3 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Mar:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 4 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Apr:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 5 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "May:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 6 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Jun:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 7 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Jul:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 8 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Aug:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 9 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Sep:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 10 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Oct:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 11 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Nov:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 12 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Dec:Currency:120"

FROM
  `tabSales Invoice` si
JOIN
  `tabSales Invoice Item` sii ON sii.parent = si.name
LEFT JOIN
  `tabSales Team` sp ON sp.parent = si.name
LEFT JOIN
  `tabItem` i ON i.name = sii.item_code
WHERE
  si.docstatus = 1
  AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
GROUP BY
  i.item_group
ORDER BY
  i.item_group

name: Sales by Item
query:
SELECT
  i.item_group AS "Item Group:Lin/Item Group:180",
  sii.item_code AS "Item Code:Lin/Item:360",

  SUM(CASE WHEN si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Total:Currency:160",

  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 1 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Jan:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 2 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Feb:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 3 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Mar:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 4 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Apr:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 5 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "May:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 6 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Jun:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 7 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Jul:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 8 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Aug:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 9 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Sep:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 10 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Oct:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 11 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Nov:Currency:120",
  SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(si.posting_date) = 12 AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s THEN sii.amount ELSE 0 END) AS "Dec:Currency:120"

FROM
  `tabSales Invoice` si
JOIN
  `tabSales Invoice Item` sii ON sii.parent = si.name
LEFT JOIN
  `tabItem` i ON i.name = sii.item_code
WHERE
  si.docstatus = 1
  AND si.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
GROUP BY
  i.item_group, sii.item_code
ORDER BY
  sii.item_code;

name: Sales Invoices Detail Report
query:
SELECT
  si.name AS "Sales Invoice:Link/Sales Invoice:200",
  si.posting_date AS "Posting Date:Date:120",
  si.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer:200",
  c.customer_group AS "Customer Group:Link/Customer Group:180",
  si.tax_id AS "NTN/CNIC:Data:130",
  si.custom_buyer_province AS "Buyer Province:Data:130",
  si.custom_scenario_detail AS "Scenario Detail:Data:170",
  sii.item_code AS "Item Code:Link/Item:180",
  i.item_group AS "Item Group:Link/Item Group:160",
  sii.qty AS "Quantity:Float:110",
  sii.rate AS "Rate:Currency:100",
  sii.amount AS "Amount:Currency:140",
  sii.custom_sale_type AS "Sale Type:Data:120",
  sii.custom_hs_code AS "HS Code:Data:120",
  sii.custom_sro_schedule_no AS "SRO Schedule No:Data:140",
  sii.custom_sro_item_sno AS "SRO Item SNo:Data:120",
  sii.custom_fbr_uom AS "FBR UOM:Data:100",
  sii.item_tax_template AS "Item Tax Template:Link/Item Tax Template:170",
  sii.custom_sales_tax_rate AS "Sales Tax Rate:Percent:120",
  sii.custom_sales_tax AS "Sales Tax:Currency:120",
  sii.custom_tax_inclusive_amount AS "Tax Inclusive Amount:Currency:150",
  sii.custom_total_tax_amount AS "Total Tax Amount:Currency:140",
  si.territory AS "Territory:Link/Territory:130",
  sp.sales_person AS "Salesperson:Link/Sales Person:150"
FROM `tabSales Invoice` si
JOIN `tabSales Invoice Item` sii ON sii.parent = si.name
LEFT JOIN `tabSales Team` sp ON sp.parent = si.name
LEFT JOIN `tabItem` i ON i.name = sii.item_code
LEFT JOIN `tabCustomer` c ON c.name = si.customer
WHERE si.docstatus = 1
  AND (%(from_date)s IS NULL OR %(from_date)s = '' OR si.posting_date >= %(from_date)s)
  AND (%(to_date)s IS NULL OR %(to_date)s = '' OR si.posting_date <= %(to_date)s)
ORDER BY si.posting_date DESC, si.name DESC;
